title: Multi-Select: Accept or Decline Multiple Offers

content.intro: The multi-select feature in Offers V2 lets you accept or decline multiple offers at once, saving time when managing a busy applicant queue.

steps.title: Tick the Checkboxes
steps.content: In Offers V2, tick the checkboxes on the left side of each offer row you want to action. You can select as many offers as needed.

steps.title: Bulk Action Bar Appears
steps.content: Once at least one offer is selected, a bulk action bar appears at the top of the offers list showing the number of selected offers and available actions.

steps.title: Decline Selected Offers
steps.content: Click 'Decline Selected' to decline all ticked offers in one action. Each declined tenant is automatically notified by email — you do not need to contact them individually.

steps.title: Accept Selected Offers
steps.content: Click 'Accept Selected' to move all ticked offers to an approved status, ready for the landlord approval or referencing steps.

sections.title: Clear Your Queue Quickly
sections.content: Use multi-select to clear a busy applicant queue quickly. When a property has been let, you can select all remaining pending offers and decline them in one click — all applicants are notified automatically without any manual emailing.
